category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on South Africa market access, NRCS Letter of Authority, SABS SANS 60034 adoption, and NERSA grid requirements.

title.en: China-to-South-Africa Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against South Africa NRCS Letter of Authority, SABS SANS 60034, NERSA grid, and MEPS IE2 direction requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与南非NRCS进口许可证（LoA）、SABS SANS 60034、NERSA电网及MEPS IE2+方向性要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與南非NRCS進口許可證（LoA）、SABS SANS 60034、NERSA電網及MEPS IE2+方向性要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS Letter of Authority determination, SABS certification assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current NRCS, SABS, NERSA, ICASA, and South African customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS进口许可证裁定、SABS认证评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行NRCS、SABS、NERSA、ICASA及南非海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS進口許可證裁定、SABS認證評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行NRCS、SABS、NERSA、ICASA及南非海關要求。

answer_first.en: The primary gate for China-to-South-Africa industrial motors is the NRCS Letter of Authority (LoA), required before import or sale of motors covered by a compulsory specification; SABS SANS 60034 (IEC 60034 adoption) sets the technical standard, and MEPS IE2 direction applies under DoE energy policy. CCC is not recognised.
answer_first.zh: 中国电机进入南非的首要门槛是NRCS进口许可证（LoA）——凡属强制规范覆盖范围的电机，进口或销售前须取得LoA；SABS SANS 60034（采用IEC 60034）为技术标准，DoE能源政策下执行MEPS IE2+方向。CCC认证不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 中國電機進入南非的首要門檻是NRCS進口許可證（LoA）——凡屬強制規範覆蓋範圍的電機，進口或銷售前須取得LoA；SABS SANS 60034（採用IEC 60034）為技術標準，DoE能源政策下執行MEPS IE2+方向。CCC認證不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
